hero.title: Welcome to Quizy Admin
hero.description: One place to manage quizzes, questions, teachers, students, units, and lessons. The screen is ready for live API data.

modules.title: Core admin modules
modules.description: These are the sections Quizy needs for a complete admin dashboard.

units.title: Units
units.description: Manage curriculum units and connect them with lessons and quizzes.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Create lessons and map them to the lessonIds used by quiz payloads.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.description: Upload and manage quizzes sent to /api/Quizes.

questions.title: Questions
questions.description: Review questions, answers, hints, and math formatting before publishing.

dynamic.title: Live data readiness
dynamic.description: Next, replace static cards with API-backed queries.

steps.1: Add summary endpoints for quizzes, questions, teachers, and students.
steps.2: Create a service layer per module using TanStack Query and axios.
steps.3: Gate sidebar modules by roles and permissions before rendering them.
